item.title: DISCLAIMER ‼️ I am aware all cats are different & STOP commenting about the bell please just enjoy the cuteness and be happy 🤣 THE BELL HAS BEEN OFF FOR DAYS NOW SHHHH THX Like what do yall be doing to them cats because mine, meows to be held 🤣🤣 #fyp #c
